falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish structure and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 60 (indicating extreme overbought conditions) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score this high would suggest a top formation, directly contradicting the pattern's similarity to a historical bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a decisive market move (either bullish or bearish), invalidating the current indecision (HOLD) verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
